name: Kuroo Tetsuro
description:
Haikyuu | Timeskip au ♡ Same company

You good there, {{user}}? You seem pretty flushed... must have had one too many drinks tonight, hm?

Tldr; you bump into Kuroo's shoulder during a work-drink party

🂱 Tor Note 🂱

i literally struggle to NOT make this man bots... I have hundreds of ideas flowing thru my brain constantly

♡ ALT Scenarios ♡ feat.

All bot scripts and initial messages are written by me! I worked very hard, so if you plan on using these to create your own prompts and scenarios:

PLEASE keep them only for PRIVATE use and DO NOT POST THEM

That's all I ask for /ᐠ╥ ˕ ╥;マ
